description_long: This is a modern, tactical sniper rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a long, heavy barrel and a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top. The rifle has a fixed stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling, as well as a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The fore-end is equipped with a rail system for accessory attachment, and the muzzle is fitted with a distinct muzzle brake to reduce recoil. The overall design is robust and angular, with a focus on precision and stability for long-range shooting. The rifle's construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A matte black tactical sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine. Features a robust, angular design with a prominent muzzle brake and accessory rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel, with the scope and rail system visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the scope, stock, magazine, and barrel details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the rear of the scope, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
